title: L-R5 Conversion Scorecard
intro: L-R5 Conversion Scorecard - W1 numeric close. 6 items. Pick + 1 line rationale.
commit_subject_template: data(lighthouse): L-R5 Conversion Scorecard {date} - W{week} close [READY]

steps.prompt: Step 1/6 - V1 sent this week count? (Then 1 line context.)
Step 2/6 - Replies received this week? (Then 1 line.)
Step 3/6 - Audits delivered this week? (Then 1 line.)
Step 4/6 - Paid Signal Sessions booked? (Then 1 line.)
Step 6/6 - Next week single focus. (Then 1 line.)
